title: Quick-Fix protected-surface policy (BASELINE)
description: Validates the canonical, framework-mandatory baseline (governance/quickfix-protected-surfaces.policy.yaml). It uses `mandatory_surfaces` and deliberately does NOT permit `additional_surfaces` (additionalProperties:false), so the baseline file cannot masquerade as an overlay. The adopter overlay is a SEPARATE document validated against schemas/quickfix-protected-surfaces.overlay.schema.json, which in turn forbids `mandatory_surfaces` — so an overlay can only EXTEND, never redefine or weaken (fail-closed: a mis-authored overlay is rejected, not silently ignored). Normative source: process/quickfix-lane.md.

mandatory_surfaces.description: Framework-mandatory surfaces. Adopters may extend via an overlay; they may not remove or weaken any entry here.

semantic_surfaces_layer_a.description: Non-globbable surfaces named for the Layer-A protocol (human/agent judgment).

items.description: Repo-relative POSIX glob, SAFE SUBSET only (letters, digits, '.', '_', '-', '/', '*'/'**'/'?'). Character classes, brace expansion, commas, and negation are disallowed (they can smuggle traversal/absolute). Leading '**/' matches any depth (gitignore-style; the guard implements the matcher — see process/quickfix-lane.md §8).
